creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Functionality of cupsddk was moved to print/cups-base [1].
Remove this port and add entry to MOVED.
Also remove it from dependency list in it's last consumer - print/splix[2].

[1] p.51 at http://www.cups.org/doc-1.4/whatsnew.html#DRIVERS
[2] http://www.freshports.org/search.php?stype=depends_all&method=match&query=cupsddk
